name: @looprun-bench/atlas-v0.6.0
author: LoopRun Team
description: Atlas benchmark — edition v0.6.0 (looprun@0.6.0). Standalone: the frozen per-edition harness plays the exported subject (world + 61 cases) through the governed (looprun) and ungoverned (Mastra) arms, then judges + scores — reproducible from this directory alone.
